register_subtitle: Register to link your Riot account and view your daily store
dash_not_bound_desc: Link your Riot account to view your daily store and favorite skins
dash_no_data: No store data for today yet
bind_title: Link Riot Account - Valorant Daily Store
bind_confirm_unbind: Are you sure you want to unlink your Riot account? Store data and favorites will be kept.
bind_privacy_note: This method does not require entering your Riot password on this site. Login is handled entirely on the official Riot page.
bind_step1_desc: Log out of your current Riot account to ensure you link the correct one.
bind_step1_guide_1: Clicking the button will open the Riot logout page in a new tab.
bind_step1_guide_2: If you are not currently logged in to any Riot account, you can skip this step.
bind_step1_guide_3: It is recommended to log out before linking a new account to avoid linking the wrong one.
bind_step2_title: Log In to Your Valorant Account
bind_step2_desc: Log in to the Valorant account you want to link on the official Riot page.
bind_step2_guide_1: After logging in, the page may appear blank or show "Something went wrong/404" — this is normal.
bind_step2_guide_2: Do not close the page, proceed to the next step.
bind_step2_guide_3: Your password is handled directly by Riot and is never stored by us.
bind_step3_desc: Copy the full URL from the browser address bar and paste it into the input below.
bind_step3_guide_2: This token is valid for about 1 hour. Please complete linking promptly.
bind_region_help: Region is auto-detected. You usually don't need to change this.
bind_token_note: Note: URL token is valid for about 1 hour. You'll need to re-link after it expires to fetch the latest store data.
fav_confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this favorite?
fav_empty: You haven't favorited any skins yet
webhook_personal_desc: Send daily skins, weekly accessories, and favorite matches to your Discord channel.
flash_webhook_missing: Configure a Discord Webhook URL first
flash_webhook_test_fail: Discord test message failed; check the URL
flash_favorite_already_in_store: Favorite saved: this skin is in today's store!
flash_register_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
flash_register_ok: Registration successful! Please link your Riot account
flash_bind_no_url: Please enter the Riot Access URL
flash_bind_ok_store_fail: Account linked, but failed to fetch store: {error}
flash_bind_ok_no_store: Riot account linked successfully, but failed to fetch store data
flash_not_bound: Please link your Riot account first
dash_weekly_desc: A weekly rotation of buddies, cards, sprays, and titles
dash_weekly_empty: Refresh the store to load this week's accessories
settings_desc: Manage the language used for your Discord notifications.
settings_notification_language_help: Daily store, favorite-match, and error notifications use this language.
settings_timezone_auto: Set time zone from Riot account region automatically
settings_timezone_auto_help: Automatic mode uses the recommended regional time zone; uncheck to choose manually.
settings_reminder_time_help: Send the Discord reminder at this local time. Default: 08:00.
discord_rebind_reminder_body: Your Riot credential has expired. Open the app and rebind to retrieve and send today's store.
